sub_modules.conv1d_window_next: Purely combinational shift-register next-state generator for the streaming stencil window.
sub_modules.conv1d_coeff_pack: Purely combinational fixed coefficient provider. Defaults to common Gaussian-style kernels, including the 5-tap [2, 8, 12, 8, 2] mask.
sub_modules.conv1d_mac: Purely combinational multiply-accumulate datapath over the flattened sample window and coefficient vector.
sub_modules.conv1d_output_cast: Purely combinational output width adapter that truncates the wide accumulator to DATA_W+GAIN_W bits.
